label: Sound
description: Defines a RimWorld sound event, including its sub-sounds, grains, and audio parameter mappings.

sustain.label: Sustain
sustain.description: If true, this sound is a sustainer with a defined beginning and end.

context.label: Context
context.description: When the sound is allowed to play: always, map-only, or world-only.

eventNames.label: Event names
eventNames.description: Alternative event names for this sound. Obsolete in source but still loadable.

maxVoices.label: Max voices
maxVoices.description: Maximum number of simultaneous instances of this sound. Minimum 1.

maxSimultaneous.label: Max simultaneous
maxSimultaneous.description: Maximum number of instances that can play at nearly the same moment.

priorityMode.label: Priority mode
priorityMode.description: Determines which instances are dropped when maxVoices is exceeded.

slot.label: Slot
slot.description: Sound slot name. Only one sound in a slot plays at a time (on-camera only).

sustainStartSound.label: Sustain start sound
sustainStartSound.description: SoundDef played when this sustainer starts.

sustainStopSound.label: Sustain stop sound
sustainStopSound.description: SoundDef played when this sustainer ends.

sustainFadeoutTime.label: Sustain fadeout time
sustainFadeoutTime.description: After the sustainer ends, it fades out over this many real-time seconds.

sustainFadeoutStartSound.label: Sustain fadeout start sound
sustainFadeoutStartSound.description: SoundDef played when this sustainer starts fading out.

subSounds.label: Sub-sounds
subSounds.description: List of sub-sound definitions that play when this sound is triggered.
